title: Senior Doctor - Aravind Eye Hospital Advisory Limited - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Aravind Eye Hospital Advisory Limited - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Aravind Eye Hospital Advisory Limited in Howrah offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Aravind Eye Hospital Advisory Limited:
Aravind Eye Hospital Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aravind Eye Hospital Advisory Limited!
